DEPT.#6, JUDGE MITCHELL, CSR MHOLMES, CLERK GMCGREW 3:15PM C/C FOR SETTLEMT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. STIPULATION REACHED. TERMS AND CONDITIONS: JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF. RESTITUTUIN AND POSSESSION OF: 782 CLEMENTINA ST. RENTS AND DAMAGES: $2086.58 THRU JUL 13, 1995. EVICITION STAYED THRU AUG. 8, 1995. DEFT. TO VACATE BY 5PM AUG 8, 1995. IF DEFT VACATES BY 8/8/95 5PM PLFT SHALL FILE DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE AND VACATE JUDGMENT. NO FURTHER STAYS. COSTS OF $100.00 FOR PLFT. DEFT AND ALL OTHER PERSONS TO VACATE. SECURITY DEPOSIT RETAINED BY PLFT. PLAINTIOFF SHALL PREPARE JUDGMENT/STIPULATIOON.
